headlines.title: Elon Musk gets combative on the stand during jury trial against OpenAI
headlines.description: Elon Musk fired back at OpenAI’s lawyer in a tense cross-examination during the second day of the long-awaited trial that pits one tech billionaire against another.

headlines.title: NBA, PGA and NCAA push for higher age minimum for sports prediction markets
headlines.description: Major sports organizations — the NBA, PGA Tour and NCAA — are pushing the federal government to raise the minimum age for sports betting on prediction markets.

headlines.title: A 'Devil Wears Prada 2' meme that viewers thought was AI slop was actually made by a human
headlines.description: What some viewers thought was an AI-generated meme in “The Devil Wears Prada 2” was actually drawn by a human artist

headlines.title: Spotify wants to help listeners better identify AI-generated music
headlines.description: Spotify is rolling out new badges to artists in a move to differentiate human-made music from AI-generated content on the popular music streaming platform

headlines.title: In Musk v. Altman case, judge warns lawyers that AI itself isn't on trial
headlines.description: The third day of Elon Musk’s testimony in his high-stakes trial against OpenAI began with a bout of bickering over whether AI could lead to the “extinction” of the human race.

headlines.title: Supreme Court temporarily restores full access to abortion pill
headlines.description: The Supreme Court provisionally blocked a lower court decision that would have limited availability nationwide of the abortion pill mifepristone.

headlines.title: Trump Says US Navy Will Escort Ships out of Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has announced that the United States military will help guide stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz. Iran is responding with new threats, warning that if any foreign armed force approaches or enters the critical passage, it “will be subjected to attack.” NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Who will own the Bernie Sanders lane in 2028?
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Leaves 3 Dead
headlines.description: A suspected hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has left three people dead and another person in intensive care. The ship is currently docked in the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of West Africa, and the operating company says passengers, including the two still on board believed to have the virus, have not been allowed to get off the boat. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Joanna Stern takes one of the viral dancing humanoid robots home
headlines.description: Dancing robots went viral but what would happen if you took one of them home? NBC News' Joanna Stern decided to find out.

headlines.title: Elon Musk testifies at OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Elon Musk testified in a landmark trial between himself and OpenAI. Musk claims Altman, his onetime associate, had betrayed the altruistic principles the AI company they co-founded was built on.

headlines.title: Jury selection begins in Elon Musk's trial against OpenAI's Sam Altman
headlines.description: Jury selection began in Elon Musk’s civil trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. NBC News’ Brian Cheung explains how both sides will try to make their case and how the jury selection is unfolding.
